case_title: MARC LAWSON VS. SYNERGY PROJECT MANAGEMENT, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (J.MIRSAIDI - AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAWSON, MARC AS TO DEFENDANT SYNERGY PROJECT MANAGEMENT, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,985.00 FILED BY LAWSON, MARC AS TO DEFENDANT SYNERGY PROJECT MANAGEMENT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2013 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED - SERVED JUN-10-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SYNERGY PROJECT MANAGEMENT, INC.
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR -JAY CELLINI. FILED BY DEFENDANT SYNERGY PROJECT MANAGEMENT, INC.
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR - EDMOND PHILLIPS. FILED BY DEFENDANT SYNERGY PROJECT MANAGEMENT, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-19-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-19-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY JASON ROHWER--RESIDENT ENGINEER DPW PROJECT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JAY CELLINI. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAWSON, MARC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SYNERGY PROJECT MANAGEMENT, INC. $4,985.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
